title: Set label change conditions for Work Management
excerpt: Monday CRM has a great native feature that allows users to “set label change conditions” for any status column, basically allowing you to create rules/required columns that users must complete before an item or subitem’s…

posts.author: paul.mandeville (Paul Mandeville)
posts.cookedHtml:
Monday CRM has a great native feature that allows users to “set label change conditions” for any status column, basically allowing you to create rules/required columns that users must complete before an item or subitem’s status can be changed. This is a great control to force users to enter all the required information.

As far as I can tell, this feature does not exist in Monday Work Management (WM)…just in the CRM product. The only way I can find to set label change conditions in WM is through third-party apps, which cost additional fees.

This feels like a critical function to maintain data integrity…and it’s already available on CRM. Would be amazing if we could see this in WM soon.

Thanks!

posts.author: meti_integration (Jo)
posts.cookedHtml:
We got access to this feature as we recently moved to Monday Service.

Our team would significantly benefit from also being able to use this across core workflows in work management as that is were 80% of our usage lives.

posts.author: noam.lapidot (Noam Lapidot)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @meti_integration

As far as I this feature is not available in WM, but if you are open to marketplace apps, there’s an app named Workflow that offers similar functionality where you can required column per status label.

Workflow - monday.com Marketplace Workflow - monday.com Marketplace

posts.author: vmccoy (V)
posts.cookedHtml:
Completely agree with this need.

Our team moved to Work Management because our needs changed to be more project heavy. We were shocked to discover there was no label conditions and it has greatly impacted our workflow and data requirements.

Please advance this! It is already in CRM, it is 100% a project management control item.
